Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given 18 events from a hospital process They are interleaved and there are no explicit case IDs We need to infer the case groupings We should analyze the sequence looking at attributes timestamp activity resource department patient age patient gender additional info Most likely a case corresponds to a single patient journey The events might involve the same patient age and gender

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We notice three distinct patient profiles based on age and gender Case A age 45 M Case B age 62 F Case C age 28 M

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case A age 45 M Event 1 Register patient ER 080513 Event 4 Initial triage ER 081050 Event 7 X ray imaging Radiology 081542 Event 12 Doctor consultation ER 082310 diagnosis hairline fracture Event 15 Patient discharged ER 083005 followup outpatient clinic

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case B age 62 F Event 2 Register patient ER 080702 Event 5 Initial triage ER 081229 Event 8 Lab test requested ER 081610 Event 10 Lab test completed Laboratory 082027 Event 11 Doctor consultation ER 082254 diagnosis minor infection Event 14 Prescription created ER 082700 Event 17 Patient discharged ER 083529

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C age 28 M Event 3 Register patient Surgery 080715 insurance private Event 6 Doctor consultation Surgery 081300 scheduled knee surgery Event 9 Surgery preparation Surgery 081645 Event 13 Surgery performed Surgery 082519 arthroscopy Event 16 Recovery room 083137 condition stable Event 18 Patient discharged Surgery 084013 physiotherapy sessions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The grouping by age and gender is consistent Also note that the patient cases flow through different departments Case A and B are in ER Case C is in Surgery scheduled No conflicts in timestamps events are sequential and logical

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The events are interleaved but each case has a clear sequence that makes clinical sense Case A registration triage X ray doctor consultation discharge Fracture Case B registration triage lab test request lab test completed doctor consultation prescription discharge Infection Case C registration Surgery doctor consultation Surgery surgery preparation surgery performed recovery discharge Knee surgery

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the case groupings are exactly those three cases We should output the inferred grouping Typically we might assign Case IDs Case 1 age 45 M Case 2 age 62 F Case 3 age 28 M
